productName: .5g Isolated Pre-Rolled Cones 6pk - Isolated Ice Cream Cake Bx1 Pre-Rolled Cones - 3g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Ice Cream Cake and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, butter, and pepper, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
